DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Patrick R. Campbell of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Leola Blackmon-Tatum as Successor-In-Interest to and as Wrongful Death Heir, of Hudson Tatum, Deceased

RULING:
DEFENDANT DILLINGHAM CONSTRUCTION N.A., INC.'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Dillingham Construction N.A., Inc.'s demurrer to the fifth and sixth causes of action in plaintiff's complaint for survival, wrongful death is overruled. Plaintiff's complaint states facts sufficient to state such causes of action against defendant as no facts in defendant's request for judicial notice demonstrate that either cause of action is time-barred. The fifth cause of action (Negligence II - Survival) meets the requirements of C.C.P. 366.1 and 340.2(a). The sixth cause of action (Negligence II - Wrongful Death) meets the requirements of C.C.P. 340.2(c). Defendant must answer within 10 days. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Kimberly R. Hendershott of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12552 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-07-2015 Continued To May-12-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503

No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Dillingham Construction N.A., Inc.'s demurrer is continued on the court's own motion to May 12, 2015. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
